title: The Lone Wolf Takes a Chance
writer: Earl Felton, Sidney Salkow, Louis Joseph Vance
actors: Warren William, June Storey, Henry Wilcoxon
plot: The Lone Wolf Michael Lanyard takes Inspector Crane's challenge that he can't keep out of trouble for 24 hours. No sooner accepted when Lanyard is sucked into a case of murder and kidnapping in which he is sole suspect. Lanyard pu...
